title: Commercial Solutions
text:
Advanced Polar Snow and Terrain Sensing
Deadline— March 9, 2026
ERDC seeks advanced capabilities for sensing and predicting operationally relevant variables in polar and subpolar snowpack and terrain surface stability.
Read MoreAdvanced Polar Snow and Terrain Sensing
Civil Works CSO
Deadline— Open through December 31, 2026
ERDC seeks to obtain innovative solutions that progress R&D efforts or advance civil works science and engineering capabilities.
Read MoreCivil Works CSO
Construction Engineering Research Laboratory CSO
Deadline— October 30, 2026
ERDC seeks to obtain innovative solutions or potential new capabilities in support of Infrastructure Science and Engineering (ISE) and Operational Science and Engineering (OSE).
Read MoreConstruction Engineering Research Laboratory CSO
Cold Regions Research and Engineering Laboratory CSO
Deadline— Open through December 31, 2026
ERDC's Cold Regions Research and Engineering Laboratory invites commercial solutions or potential new capabilities in support of challenges facing Warfighters and the nation in cold and complex regions.
Read MoreCold Regions Research and Engineering Laboratory CSO
